characters.name: Blooter
characters.description: A blue tall anthropomorphic dog who come up with ideas to solve problems. Accessory-Wearing Cartoon Animal: He sports a yellow helmet when riding his scooter, a red collar around his neck, and a yellow backpack on his back. Amazing Technicolor Wildlife: A blue dog with dark blue polka-dots. Amusing Injuries: In the episode "Blooter Gets a Boo-Boo", he is shown to be a little careless, as he accidentally banged his thumb when he tried to hammer the nails in. Author Avatar: Blooter is obviously based of the creator of the series, Jun Ichihara.

characters.name: Patty
characters.description: A yellow anthropomorphic cat girl who knows everything. Blue Is Heroic: Wears a blue bandana around her neck. Catchphrase: "Fascinating!". Cats Hate Water: Most cats hate water, but Patty doesn't seem to mind the water. She loves playing in the rain and swimming in Sparkly Bay. Code Name: Patty is revealed to have a spy codename called "Cookie-Finder" in the episode "Eye Spy".

characters.name: Bobby
characters.description: An orange anthropomorphic bear who helps with the equipment. Blue Is Heroic: Wears a blue beret on his head. Catchphrase: "Never fear, Bobb. E. Quipment is here!" and "I've got just the thing!". Code Name: Bobby is revealed to have a spy codename called "Nail-Hammer" in the episode "Eye Spy". Face Your Fears: He is shown to have a fear of volcanoes in the episode "Lava Luau".

characters.name: Alli
characters.description: An anthropomorphic jazzy alligator who has a big interest in music.

characters.name: Cocori
characters.description: An anthropomorphic chicken girl who loves making smoothies. Accessory-Wearing Cartoon Animal: She sports a red helmet and roller skate shoes when she skating around. Blue Is Heroic: Wears a blue scarf around her neck. Catchphrase: Her catchphrase is "chicken barks", when she talks. Country Cousin: Cocori is revealed to have a cousin named "Jeejeeri" in the episode "Chicken Flap".

characters.name: Cozy
characters.description: An anthropomorphic zebra who look after traffic. Accessory-Wearing Cartoon Animal: He sports a red helmet when riding his blue wooden horse. Amazing Technicolor Wildlife: A zebra with red and white stripes.

characters.name: Captain Cap
characters.description: A pink anthropomorphic sheep who loves to tell his pirate stories. Alliterative Name:CaptainCap. Big Fun: Loved telling pirate stories when his friends needed help. Blue Is Heroic: Wears a blue scarf around his neck. Byronic Hero: During his younger days, he found a mysterious pink wishing pearl before being a pirate. This was shown in the episode "Patty the Fairy".
